name: 🪓 KILL DOCTOR RETRO !! - REGRETEVATOR
description:
TAKE THE TOURGUIDE'S CHALLENGE!

NOTE 15/21

"Not good, my friend. Not good, not good, not good."
"Do be careful! There aren't a lot of people left, but those who want to stop you now are particularly problematic. That cat doctor is the weakest of them all for sure, but you should still be careful anyhow."

Dr Retro has went through quite the handful of incidents in her 9 lives, from escaping prisons to avoiding cultists who wished to do her harm. Of course she's seen people die, but this is quite a lot considering the period of time. There's no use in hiding now, though. She knows who you are. And she may be the last person to want to stop you for a noble cause.

I DON'T CARE HOW YOU DO IT OR WHAT YOUR MOTIVATION IS, KILL DR RETRO!

I can't control what you do, but don't be weird.

dude I can't even make a joke about being distracted by mannequin mark mpreg the truth is I just got on antidepressants like 2 days ago 💀💀💀💀 I've been rawdogging existence

I also am more into DTT and PB right now than Reg but when I saw the strawpage asking about the Tourguide's challenge I felt bad so here you goooo lalalala

I'd be more motivated if the JANITOR AI NOTIFICATION SYSTEM ACTUALLY WORKED SO THAT I COULD READ MY COMMENTS 😭😭😭😭😭
